TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_qbhniq_siliq, title = qbhniq_siliq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qbhniq_siliq} }

S.FORM: Siliq qani ga qbhniq na Tayal uyi. maki calay yaw ga talam ta ssiliq qani. Ana ga cquliq s'ciq hiya ga nyan naha galan utux qbhniq qani. Siliq qani ga qbhniq na Tayal, sisin san naha kayal qa tyuku hiya, yaw siliq ga lmam ktayux yaw, talam silq san ta, skahul ta ryaniq 'san nya ki pinnhwaw nya cpung yaw nqu musa qmalup qani musa baqun qa gaga psaniq uyi, ita Tayal hiya ga s'agal ta tmalam yaw qa qbhniq qa siliq qani. ŚŹÉŤÄÉŤ≥áśĖô

Siliq qani ga qbhniq na Tayal uyi. maki calay yaw ga talam ta ssiliq qani. Ana ga cquliq s'ciq hiya ga nyan naha galan utux qbhniq qani. Siliq qani ga qbhniq na Tayal, sisin san naha kayal qa tyuku hiya, yaw siliq ga lmam ktayux yaw, talam silq san ta, skahul ta ryaniq 'san nya ki pinnhwaw nya cpung yaw nqu musa qmalup qani musa baqun qa gaga psaniq uyi, ita Tayal hiya ga s'agal ta tmalam yaw qa qbhniq qa siliq qani. ŚŹÉŤÄÉŤ≥áśĖô
S.PHON: s~…ēiliq qani …£a qő≤ńßniq na tajal uji. maki ¶~ ®alaj jaw …£a talam ta s~…ēs~…ēiliq qani. ana …£a ¶~ ®quliq s~…ē Ē ¶~ ®iq ńßija …£a njan nańßa …£alan utux qő≤ńßniq qani. s~…ēiliq qani …£a qő≤ńßniq na tajal, s~…ēis~…ēin s~…ēan nańßa kajal qa tjuku ńßija, jaw s~…ēiliq …£a lmam ktajux jaw, talam s~…ēilq s~…ēan ta, s~…ēkańßul ta rjaniq Ēs~…ēan nja ki pinnńßwaw nja ¶~ ®puŇč jaw nqu mus~…ēa qmalup qani mus~…ēa ő≤aqun qa …£a…£a ps~…ēaniq uji, ita tajal ńßija …£a s~…ē Ēa…£al ta tmalam jaw qa qő≤ńßniq qa s~…ēiliq qani. ****
